test.name: Initialize project from FamilySearch tree person ID and full objective
test.description: Single-turn decomposition of the init-project workflow (per unit-test-spec.md §1): the user provides a complete research objective and a FamilySearch person ID in one message, skipping the interview phase. The skill should create both research.json and tree.gedcomx.json, treat the FamilySearch person data as a starting stub (not authoritative facts), and produce a project ready for research.

input.user_message: Start a new research project to identify the parents of Patrick Flynn, born around 1845 in Pennsylvania and died 1908 in Schuylkill County. His FamilySearch person ID is LZNY-BRF.

judge_context: Should set `project.objective` to a paraphrase of the user's stated goal — not the literal user_message; the objective should be a clean research statement
Should create a stub person in tree.gedcomx.json from the person-read-flynn fixture data, with only known fields populated and unknown fields omitted (not filled with placeholders)
Should mark facts derived from FamilySearch tree data as UNVERIFIED — e.g., source them to FamilySearch-tree-as-source rather than treating user-tree data as primary evidence
